report_name: Industrial Acceptance Corp. Notifies 79k Individuals of Data Breach by INC Ransomware Over a Year Later

threat_actors.name: INC
threat_actors.description: A known ransomware-as-a-service (RaaS) group that conducted a double-extortion ransomware attack against Industrial Acceptance Corp. in March 2025, exfiltrating sensitive PII before encrypting files.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: The INC ransomware payload was executed across the Industrial Acceptance Corp. network to encrypt files, rendering systems unusable as the final stage of the attack.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over Alternative Protocol
attack_patterns.description: The INC ransomware group exfiltrated large volumes of sensitive data, including Social Security numbers and driver's license numbers, to their own servers before encrypting the victim's files as part of their double extortion tactics.

attack_patterns.name: Inhibit System Recovery
attack_patterns.description: INC ransomware attacks typically delete volume shadow copies using commands like 'vssadmin delete shadows' to prevent easy recovery from local backups.

malware.name: INC Ransomware
malware.description: The ransomware payload used by the INC group to encrypt files on the Industrial Acceptance Corp. network and exfiltrate data as part of a double-extortion scheme. Files encrypted by this malware are often appended with the .INC extension.

tools.name: rclone
tools.description: A legitimate data transfer tool commonly abused by ransomware groups like INC for data exfiltration prior to encryption.

identities.name: Industrial Acceptance Corp.
identities.description: A Connecticut-based consumer finance company that was the victim of a double-extortion ransomware attack by the INC group, resulting in the compromise of PII for 79,216 individuals.

indicators.name: INC Ransomware Volume Shadow Copy Deletion
indicators.pattern:
title: INC Ransomware Volume Shadow Copy Deletion
id: 2b3c4d5e-6f7a-4b8c-9d0e-1f2a3b4c5d6e
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of 'vssadmin delete shadows', a command commonly used by ransomware like INC to inhibit system recovery.
references:
  - https://www.claimdepot.com/data-breach/industrial-acceptance-data-breach-affects-79216-individuals/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-29
tags:
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.impact
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of 'vssadmin delete shadows', a command commonly used by ransomware like INC to inhibit system recovery.

indicators.name: INC Ransomware Rclone Exfiltration Tool Usage
indicators.pattern:
title: INC Ransomware Rclone Exfiltration Tool Usage
id: 7a8b9c0d-1e2f-4a3b-4c5d-6e7f8a9b0c1d
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of rclone.exe, a legitimate data transfer tool often abused by ransomware groups like INC for data exfiltration.
references:
  - https://www.claimdepot.com/data-breach/industrial-acceptance-data-breach-affects-79216-individuals/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-29
tags:
  - attack.t1048
  - attack.exfiltration
level: medium
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\rclone.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of rclone.exe, a legitimate data transfer tool often abused by ransomware groups like INC for data exfiltration.

indicators.name: INC Ransomware File Encryption
indicators.pattern:
title: INC Ransomware File Encryption
id: 8b9c0d1e-2f3a-4b4c-5d6e-7f8a9b0c1d2e
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of files with the '.INC' extension, which is characteristic of files encrypted by INC ransomware.
references:
  - https://www.claimdepot.com/data-breach/industrial-acceptance-data-breach-affects-79216-individuals/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-29
tags:
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.impact
level: high
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '.INC'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the creation of files with the '.INC' extension, which is characteristic of files encrypted by INC ransomware.
